ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alphonso Kimbell for and with Kimberly Lucas.

Court has received the Third Supplement. Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examinor's notes. Case was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Alphonso Kimbell to appear on September 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a complete Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed. The matter was continued to September 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Lucas in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about appointing Ms. Lucas without Counsel and conflict. The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Lucas to obtain Counsel.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
